column1: # Moonstone Reborn regression goldens.  Columns are TAB-separated:
# kind=ramfnv : cold-boot to <frame>, FNV-1a hash of all RAM == golden  (engine/behaviour)
#   input is "cold" (ignored).  Catches any unintended change to game behaviour.
# kind=framesha : loadstate <input>.sav, render frame <frame>, SHA-256 == golden  (display)
#   input is a save filename under dist/MoonstoneNative/ (local, not in repo).
# Re-baseline after an INTENTIONAL change:  python recomp/regress/check.py --update
